text.tspan: u2022 polling: client asks every N seconds 'anything new?' u2192 Nu00d7 latency, Nu00d7 wasted load
u2022 watch: server pushes within milliseconds, only when there's actually news
u2022 watch scales: thousands of subscribers on one server, near-zero idle cost
u2022 used by: etcd watch, ZooKeeper watches, Kafka consumer rebalance,
Kubernetes informer cache, Consul blocking queries

g.text: 2. No changes u2014 connection stays open, no traffic
4. Server pushes event to ALL subscribers immediately
remember: client X wants /services/api changes after rev 42
